notes: v363 — ALL SHARES SHOWN AGAIN. v361's speed work capped the table at 120 rows (500 via 'Show more') and it read as 'the app only loaded 120 shares' — it never was: every share is always loaded and scanned; the cap only limited how many ROWS were drawn. That felt like a downgrade, so it's rolled back: the table shows up to 1,000 rows by default (250 on phones) and the counter now says '2,900 stocks loaded & scanned · showing top 1,000 · Show all 2,900' — and Show all really shows ALL of them, streamed in smoothly so the page doesn't freeze. The v361 speed-ups that DON'T hide anything (faster filters, smoother scrolling) are kept. ALSO IN v362 (same day): fixed the startup 'not auto running' stall — a race meant the auto-load quietly bailed before your saved API key was restored, and gave up after 20 silent seconds; it now retries for up to 30 minutes and tells you if the connection is the problem. Note: the very first open still has to fetch the share list live and then download the full market once — that stretch is slow by nature; every open after it loads instantly from your saved data. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v363.
